short_desc: WAIST1 cannot differ by more than 1 inch from WAIST2
full_desc: If WAIST1 != 888 and WAIST2 != 888 then WAIST1 (Participant waist measurement) cannot differ by more than 1 inch from WAIST2 (Participant waist measurement)
test_logic: If WAIST1 != 888 and WAIST2 != 888 and |WAIST1 - WAIST2| > 1

short_desc: HIP1 cannot differ by more than 1 inch from HIP2
full_desc: If HIP1 != 888 and HIP2 != 888 then HIP1 (Participant hip measurement) cannot differ by more than 1 inch from HIP2 (Participant hip measurement)
test_logic: If HIP1 != 888 and HIP2 != 888 and |HIP1- HIP2| > 1
